    • Method Detail

      • isSecureModeEnabled

        public boolean isSecureModeEnabled()
        Returns:
        the secureMode enabled or not

      • setSecureMode

        public void setSecureMode​(boolean secureMode)
        Parameters:
        secureMode - Indicates whether secure connection is required. Remaining parameters take effect only if secureMode is true

      • isValidatePeerCertificateEnabled

        public boolean isValidatePeerCertificateEnabled()
        Returns:
        the Validate Peer Certificate is enabled or not

      • setValidatePeerCerticate

        public void setValidatePeerCerticate​(boolean validatePeerCertificate)
        Parameters:
        validatePeerCertificate - Validate peer certificate. If true, reader certificate is validated against root certificate

      • setValidatePeerCertificate

        public void setValidatePeerCertificate​(boolean validatePeerCertificate)
        Parameters:
        validatePeerCertificate - Validate peer certificate. If true, reader certificate is validated against root certificate

      • getClientCertificate

        public java.lang.String getClientCertificate()
        Returns:
        the Client Certificate Data

      • setClientCertificate

        public void setClientCertificate​(java.lang.String clientCertBuff)
        Parameters:
        clientCertBuff - LLRP client's certificate data. Non-empty for client certificate authentication

      • getClientPrivateKey

        public java.lang.String getClientPrivateKey()
        Returns:
        the Client Private Key Data

      • setClientPrivateKey

        public void setClientPrivateKey​(java.lang.String clientKeyBuff)
        Parameters:
        clientKeyBuff - Client's private key data. Non-empty for client certificate authentication

      • getPhraseInfo

        public java.lang.String getPhraseInfo()
        Returns:
        the Private Key password

      • setPhraseInfo

        public void setPhraseInfo​(java.lang.String phraseBuff)
        Parameters:
        phraseBuff - Sets Private key password

      • getRootCertificate

        public java.lang.String getRootCertificate()
        Returns:
        the Root Certificate Data

      • setRootCertificate

        public void setRootCertificate​(java.lang.String rootCertBuff)
        Parameters:
        rootCertBuff - Root certificate data. Non-empty for reader certificate validation

      • getConnectionStatus

        public long getConnectionStatus()
        Returns:
        the Status of secure connection

      • setConnectionStatus

        public void setConnectionStatus​(long connStatus)
        Parameters:
        connStatus - Status of secure connection
